description: KEYSTONE: mode-generalize the lifecycle data so `plan` can be a third lifecycle peer to build/fix. Today transitions/gate-policy/artifact-maps/phase→status are hard-coded to the build graph (lifecycle-guard.js:31, vision-server.js:42, artifact-manager.js:12) and the runner only branches feature-vs-bug (build.js:629,4632). Lift these into mode-scoped data; consolidate the split phase vocabularies (VisionStore.phase vs lifecycle.currentPhase vs feature-scan inference) onto lifecycle.currentPhase. This generalization is also what makes the integration ports pluggable. Unblocks COMP-ROADMAP-PLAN. Anchor: docs/plans/2026-06-21-roadmap-planning-model-design.md.

completions.notes: Keystone: mode-keyed lifecycle registry (build|fix|plan); build/fix byte-identical; 4360 tests green; Codex REVIEW CLEAN
